jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Live Video Ingest
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Twitch Live Video Ingest pipeline that powers millions of concurrent streamers across the global creator-economy platform's distributed media infrastructure.

  • Go, FFmpeg, and low-latency streaming experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Creator-Success Strategy
jobs.content: Own Twitch's creator-success strategy roadmap across partner-program adoption, education, and community-engagement motion.
